data.title: Walmart expected to report earnings of 73 cents/share on $190.43 billion revenue, while DoorDash warned of lower-than-expected earnings.
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up today, with focus on Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) expected to report earnings of 73 cents per share on revenue of $190.43 billion. Walmart's shares dropped 0.4% to $126.11 after hours. DoorDash Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) reported lower fourth-quarter earnings than anticipated. DoorDash forecasts first-quarter marketplace gross order value (GOV) between $31 billion to $31.8 billion. Get more details on Benzinga.com.
PM Modi highlights on Twitter that AI deepfakes and fake content are destabilizing, calling for clear source standards, watermarking, and child safety vigilance.

data.title: PIPPIN, a Solana-based memecoin, has surged 25% this year, outperforming Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) which have dropped 23% and 33% respectively.
data.description: In a year where major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) faced significant losses, a lesser-known token called PIPPIN, a Solana-based memecoin (PIPPIN), has shown remarkable growth, increasing by nearly 25% in 2026. This has positioned PIPPIN as the fifth most successful cryptocurrency despite the overall bearish trend in the market. In comparison, Bitcoin has fallen by 23% and Ethereum by 33% during the same period. This information, including more details, can be found on Benzinga.com.
Airbus not satisfied with 2026 shipment volumes from Pratt & Whitney, which are below previously agreed amounts, says CEO.
Inflation projected to stay within target in 2026 and 2027, says Indonesia’s C.B. governor.
Philippine C.B. governor forecasts 4.6% economic growth for 2026.
GDP in the Philippines expected to expand 5.9% in 2027, says central bank governor.

data.title: Eupraxia Pharma prices US$55M public offering of shares & warrants.
data.description: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals has disclosed the pricing details of its recent public offering, valuing it at US$55 million. This offering involves the sale of common shares and pre-funded warrants, signifying a significant financial move for the company.

data.title: GomSpace sees record Q4 with all-time high revenue, 3x EBITDA growth, and 12% backlog increase in 2025.
data.description: In February 19, 2026, GomSpace achieved record-breaking revenue and saw their EBITDA increase threefold. The company also secured significant contracts for the upcoming year. Their year-end balance sheet and cash position were robust, with a 12% increase in backlog over the entire year. This positive performance was reflected in their fourth-quarter results of 2025.

data.title: DOJ investigates Warner Bros. sale's impact on theatres, questioning largest chain owners; probing effect on movie releases.
data.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has called in major theatre chain owners to investigate the ramifications of the potential Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. (NASDAQ: WBD) sale. The DOJ aims to determine if this sale would impact the public's movie-watching experiences or the number of films shown in theatres. According to Bloomberg, federal lawyers are particularly worried about the stronghold of Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) in the streaming industry. Additionally, the company's ongoing practice of featuring only a limited selection of films in theatres is under scrutiny. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bizzdesign enters Tech200 at 17th place after 392% UK public sector revenue growth. Top 20 of fastest-growing UK suppliers.
data.description: A company specializing in enterprise transformation software as a service has achieved a significant milestone by securing the 17th spot in Tussell's Tech200 ranking for the fastest-growing UK public sector technology suppliers. This independent annual list highlights the top 200 companies in the sector, and the company's entry into the Top 20 signifies a notable achievement in their growth and impact. The company is based in Enschede, Netherlands, and the ranking was announced on February 19, 2026. This recognition underscores the company's strong performance and relevance in the competitive technology market, showcasing their dedication to innovation and success.
According to Indonesia’s C.B. governor, the world economy is slowing amid elevated uncertainty.

data.title: SAP suggests dividend of €2.50 per share, up by €0.15 (6.4%) from last year's dividend.
data.description: In Walldorf, Germany, on February 19, 2026, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) has announced a proposed dividend of €2.50 per share for fiscal year 2025. This marks a 6.4% increase, amounting to €0.15 more than the dividend distributed in fiscal year 2024. Both the Supervisory Board and Executive Board are in favor of this recommendation and urge shareholders to approve it.

data.title: NHOA Energy is progressing on the 10 MW/51 MWh project for Neoen in Italy, with commissioning set for late spring 2026.
data.description: A company known as NHOA Energy, a major player in the utility-scale energy storage systems industry, is currently in the process of building the Broni Battery project in Broni (Pavia), Italy. This project, carried out for Neoen, a prominent renewable energy producer, will have a capacity of 10 MW and 51 MWh. The construction work at the site is currently in progress and is on track as per the schedule. The plan is to commence commissioning activities around late spring in 2026. The Broni Battery is expected to offer crucial flexibility and support once it becomes operational.
